productDisplayName: Peter England Unisex Black Laptop Bag
description: Black laptop bag has green stitched detail and brand patch in front Has a two short top handles and a detachable and adjustable strap Has a compartment in front with a zippered closure, has a slip pocket with a velcro closure and an organiser sleeve built into the lining Has one main compartment with a padded separator, two slit pockets and a meshed zippered pouch built into the lining Has a zippered pocket at the back
